deep_dive.title: TACO: Towards Task-Consistent Open-Vocabulary Adaptation in Video Recognition
deep_dive.abstract: Adapting CLIP for open-vocabulary video recognition necessitates a delicate balance between newly acquired video knowledge and the pretrained generalization. While existing studies pursue this generalization-specialization trade-off with additional regularizations or constraints, we argue that they overlook the deviation of representations beyond the fine-tuning data distribution, resulting in suboptimal adaptation effects. We believe such deviation is inherited from the inconsistency between the fine-tuning and evaluation objectives, where model optimization is restricted to the known training distribution but evaluated on unseen ones. In this paper, we introduce \emph{TACO}, a simple yet effective framework to mitigate the potential negative effects induced by this inconsistency. Our key insight is that adaptation should preserve OOD-relevant alignment beyond the training distribution. To this end, we propose \emph{Relative Structure Distillation}, which regularizes the relative geometry of the representation space and suppresses harmful alignment shift during training. We further decouple the representation space from the optimization space with a lightweight specialization projection, allowing task-specific adaptation without directly overspecializing the representations used at test time. \emph{TACO} establishes state-of-the-art performance on diverse benchmarks under cross-dataset and base-to-novel settings. Code will be released at https://github.com/ZMHH-H/TACO.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: open-vocabulary video recognition adapting CLIP to unseen categories
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 开放词汇视频识别，将CLIP适应未见类别
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 开放词汇视频识别，将CLIP适应未见类别
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 开放词汇视频识别，将CLIP适应未见类别
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: TACO adapts CLIP for open-vocabulary video recognition, addressing distribution mismatch between fine-tuning and evaluation, enabling recognition of unseen actions.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该文提出TACO框架，用于开放词汇视频识别，通过缓解微调与评估分布不匹配问题，使CLIP高效适应未见类别。方法本质支持零样本动作识别，虽未显式聚焦组合动作，但其适应策略可直接迁移至组合场景，为零样本组合动作识别提供方法论桥梁。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该文提出TACO框架，用于开放词汇视频识别，通过缓解微调与评估分布不匹配问题，使CLIP高效适应未见类别。方法本质支持零样本动作识别，虽未显式聚焦组合动作，但其适应策略可直接迁移至组合场景，为零样本组合动作识别提供方法论桥梁。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 零样本组合动作识别, especially work that connects or combines: zero-shot learning for action recognition; compositional action recognition methods; zero-shot action recognition with composition; zero shot compositional action recognition methods; learning to recognize unseen action compositions; compositional action recognition without training samples.
